title: New Jersey cannot regulate Kalshi's prediction market, U.S. appeals court rules
summary: A federal appeals court ruled that New Jersey cannot regulate Kalshi's prediction market, marking the first major precedent limiting state gaming regulators' authority over prediction markets. The decision could significantly reshape how states regulate this emerging financial sector. The ruling suggests federal authority may supersede state jurisdiction in prediction market regulation.
content: The ruling marked the first time a federal appeals court has ruled on what has become the central issue in an escalating battle over the ability of state gaming regulators to police the activity of prediction market operators.

zh.title: 美国上诉法院裁定新泽西州无法监管Kalshi预测市场
zh.summary: 联邦上诉法院裁定新泽西州无法监管Kalshi预测市场，标志着首个限制州博彩监管机构对预测市场权限的主要先例。这一裁决可能会显著改变各州如何监管这一新兴金融部门。该裁决表明联邦权限可能会在预测市场监管中取代州管辖权。

title: Trump's Hormuz deadline looms but Asian nations have already struck deals with Iran
summary: Several Asian nations have already secured energy agreements with Iran ahead of Trump's Strait of Hormuz deadline, reflecting regional economies' heavy dependence on Middle East energy. These pre-emptive deals suggest nations are hedging against potential conflict escalation. The agreements demonstrate how geopolitical uncertainty is reshaping energy diplomacy in Asia-Pacific.
content: Nations in the region have been keen to reach agreements as their economies are heavily reliant on Middle East energy.

zh.title: 特朗普霍尔木兹海峡截止期限临近，但亚洲国家已与伊朗达成协议
zh.summary: 在特朗普的霍尔木兹海峡截止期限前，亚洲多国已与伊朗达成能源协议，反映了地区经济对中东能源的重度依赖。这些预先达成的协议表明各国正在对冲潜在的冲突升级风险。这些协议展示了地缘政治不确定性如何重塑亚太地区的能源外交。

title: Broadcom’s stock is rising. Here’s why its new Google and Anthropic deals are so significant.
summary: Broadcom's expanded deals with Google and Anthropic position the company as a major winner in the AI infrastructure market, with analysts projecting potential earnings upside. The agreements reflect surging chip demand from leading AI companies racing to build larger models. Investors view the contracts as validation of Broadcom's strategic position in AI semiconductor supply.
content: Expanded chip agreements “put the spotlight back on Broadcom as a major winner” and could pave the way for earnings upside, analysts say.

zh.title: 博通股价上升。以下是其与谷歌和Anthropic的新协议如此重要的原因
zh.summary: 博通与谷歌和Anthropic扩大的交易使该公司成为人工智能基础设施市场的主要赢家，分析师预计可能有收益增长空间。这些协议反映了领先人工智能公司对芯片的激增需求，这些公司竞相构建更大的模型。投资者将这些合同视为对博通在人工智能半导体供应中战略地位的验证。

title: S&P 500 futures are little changed as Trump’s deadline to reopen Strait of Hormuz nears: Live updates
summary: Stock markets moved higher as investors bet on imminent resolution of the Middle East conflict before Trump's Hormuz deadline expires. S&P 500 futures remained relatively stable, suggesting cautious optimism about de-escalation. Market movements remain closely tied to geopolitical developments and deadline developments.
content: Stocks moved higher on Monday as investors bet that the end to the Middle East conflict was near.

zh.title: 随着特朗普重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的截止期限临近，标普500期货变化不大：实时更新
zh.summary: 随着投资者押注中东冲突将在特朗普霍尔木兹海峡截止期限前得到解决，股票市场上涨。标普500期货保持相对稳定，表明对降级的谨慎乐观。市场走势与地缘政治发展和截止期限发展密切相关。

title: Businesses scramble to get noticed by AI search
summary: Companies are rapidly adjusting how they present information on websites to improve visibility in AI-powered search engines and discovery tools. This shift reflects the growing importance of AI search in directing traffic and customer acquisition. Businesses are adapting traditional SEO strategies to account for AI-specific indexing and ranking.
content: Firms are changing the way they present information on their websites, so they get noticed by AI.

zh.title: 企业争相获得AI搜索的关注
zh.summary: 公司正在迅速调整网站上呈现信息的方式,以提高在AI驱动搜索引擎和发现工具中的可见性。这一转变反映了AI搜索在引导流量和客户获取中日益重要的作用。企业正在调整传统SEO策略,以适应AI特定的索引和排名。

title: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: Why AI isn't replacing jobs in China (yet)
summary: Chinese engineers appear more insulated from job displacement despite rapid AI adoption, contrasting sharply with recent Silicon Valley layoffs. This divergence reflects differences in how Chinese companies are deploying and integrating AI technology into existing operations. The regional variation suggests labor market impacts of AI adoption differ significantly by geography.
content: Rapid adoption of artificial intelligence has many in Silicon Valley reeling from news of layoffs. Engineers in China appear to be more insulated.

zh.title: CNBC《中国连接》通讯:为什么AI尚未取代中国的工作
zh.summary: 尽管AI快速采用,中国工程师似乎更能抵御失业风险,与最近硅谷大规模裁员形成鲜明对比。这种分歧反映了中国企业部署和整合AI技术方式的差异。区域差异表明AI采用对劳动力市场的影响因地理位置而异。

title: Jim Cramer says potential stock market bottom is tied to interest rates, not war headlines
summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer argues that interest rates, not geopolitical headlines, are the primary driver of stock market dynamics and potential bottoms. Investors shouldn't assume markets have found a bottom based solely on near-term headline developments. Fundamental economic factors underlying interest rates matter more than short-term geopolitical volatility.
content: CNBC's Jim Cramer said investors shouldn't get comfortable calling a market bottom just yet, because the real driver of this market isn't geopolitics.

zh.title: 吉姆·克莱默表示潜在股市底部与利率挂钩而非战争头条
zh.summary: CNBC的吉姆·克莱默辩称,利率而非地缘政治头条是股市动态和潜在底部的主要驱动力。投资者不应仅基于近期头条发展就假设市场已找到底部。驱动利率的基本经济因素比短期地缘政治波动更重要。

title: Amazon, USPS strike a deal — showing they still need each other despite threats of big delivery cuts
summary: Amazon and USPS reached a new agreement demonstrating their continued interdependence despite recent rhetoric about potential delivery cuts. The deal arrives as Amazon expands warehouse networks and same-day delivery capabilities nationwide. The partnership remains critical for both companies' logistics operations and customer service.
content: The agreement arrives as Amazon continues to expand its warehouse network and focus on same-day deliveries.

zh.title: 亚马逊与美国邮政达成协议——尽管面临大幅削减快递的威胁，它们仍然相互依存
zh.summary: 亚马逊和美国邮政达成了新协议，表明尽管最近有关于可能削减快递的言论，但它们仍然相互依存。该协议是在亚马逊扩展全国仓库网络和同日快递能力的背景下达成的。这一合作对两家公司的物流运营和客户服务至关重要。

title: As stocks approach a true comeback, here’s where investors can find the richest opportunities
summary: Despite a recent rebound, the S&P 500 remains down for the year, but analysts are identifying sectors where valuations offer attractive risk-reward opportunities. The analysis helps investors navigate market recovery by highlighting areas of relative undervaluation. Market conditions may present entry points for strategic investors across various asset classes.
content: The S&P 500 remains down this year despite its recent rebound.

zh.title: 随着股票接近真正反弹，投资者可以在这里找到最丰厚的机会
zh.summary: 尽管最近反弹，标普500指数今年仍然下跌，但分析师们正在确定那些估值提供吸引人风险回报机会的行业。该分析通过强调相对低估的领域来帮助投资者驾驭市场复苏。市场条件可能为战略投资者在各种资产类别中提供切入点。

title: A top J.P. Morgan strategist tackles some of the biggest myths about the war in Iran
summary: A J.P. Morgan strategist clarifies that U.S. export status in certain fuels won't insulate the American economy from higher global energy prices driven by the Iran conflict. The analysis challenges common assumptions about energy independence benefits during geopolitical crises. The U.S. economy remains vulnerable to international energy cost spikes.
content: Just because the U.S. is a net exporter of certain fuels doesn’t mean its economy won’t feel some serious blowback from higher global energy costs driven by the conflict in Iran.

zh.title: 摩根大通顶级策略师揭示伊朗战争的一些最大迷思
zh.summary: 摩根大通策略师澄清，美国在某些燃料方面的出口地位不会使美国经济免受伊朗冲突推高的全球能源价格上涨的影响。该分析质疑了关于地缘政治危机期间能源独立益处的常见假设。美国经济仍然容易受到国际能源成本飙升的影响。

title: Epstein files: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick set for May 6 interview by House Oversight
summary: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick will be interviewed by House Oversight on May 6 regarding discrepancies in his statements about ties to Jeffrey Epstein. Lutnick previously claimed he cut contact with Epstein in 2005, but newly released files show his family had lunch with Epstein in 2012. The interview stems from these documented contradictions in his public statements.
content: Commerce Secretary Lutnick originally claimed to have cut off contact with Jeffrey Epstein in 2005. But he and his family had lunch with the predator in 2012.

zh.title: 爱泼斯坦文件：商务部长霍华德·卢特尼克定于5月6日接受众议院监督委员会采访
zh.summary: 商务部长霍华德·卢特尼克将于5月6日接受众议院监督委员会的采访，涉及他关于与杰弗里·爱泼斯坦关系的声明中的不一致之处。卢特尼克曾声称他在2005年与爱泼斯坦断绝联系，但新近发布的文件显示他的家人在2012年与爱泼斯坦共进午餐。该采访源于他公开声明中这些有据可查的矛盾。

title: Trump administration finalizes better-than-feared Medicare Advantage payment rate in boost to health insurers
summary: The Trump administration increased average Medicare Advantage payments by 2.48%—more than $13 billion—for 2027, surpassing industry expectations. The increase delivers a significant boost to health insurers who operate these programs. The decision reflects the administration's approach to healthcare policy affecting millions of seniors.
content: The Trump administration will increase average Medicare Advantage payments by 2.48%, or more than $13 billion, in 2027.

zh.title: 特朗普政府最终敲定优于预期的医疗保险优势计划支付费率，利好健康保险公司
zh.summary: 特朗普政府将2027年医疗保险优势计划的平均支付增加2.48%——超过130亿美元——超过行业预期。这一增加为运营这些项目的健康保险公司提供了重大支持。该决定反映了政府对影响数百万老年人的医疗保健政策的态度。

title: OpenAI asks California, Delaware to investigate Musk's 'anti-competitive behavior' ahead of April trial
summary: OpenAI requested investigations by California and Delaware attorneys general into alleged anti-competitive behavior by Elon Musk and associates ahead of an April trial. The request represents OpenAI's effort to build regulatory pressure before forthcoming legal proceedings. The move escalates the broader dispute between OpenAI and Musk over competition and control.
content: OpenAI sent a letter to the California and Delaware attorneys general, urging them to investigate "anti-competitive behavior" by Elon Musk and his associates.

zh.title: OpenAI要求加州、特拉华州调查马斯克"反竞争行为"，为4月庭审做准备
zh.summary: OpenAI要求加州和特拉华州检察长在4月庭审前调查埃隆·马斯克及其同伙的涉嫌反竞争行为。这一请求代表了OpenAI在即将进行的法律诉讼前施加监管压力的努力。此举升级了OpenAI与马斯克之间关于竞争和控制的更广泛纠纷。

title: This ‘overlooked’ AI stock is a new top pick at Morgan Stanley
summary: Morgan Stanley designates Seagate as a top stock pick despite its recent gains, suggesting investors are undervaluing the company. The analyst firm believes the stock deserves greater market recognition and could see further appreciation.
content: Morgan Stanley says investors still aren’t giving Seagate’s stock enough respect, despite its massive recent gains.

zh.title: 这只"被忽视的"人工智能股票是摩根士丹利的新热门推荐
zh.summary: 尽管希捷股票最近有所上涨，摩根士丹利仍将其列为热门股票推荐，表明投资者可能低估了该公司。该分析公司认为该股票应该获得更多市场认可，并有可能进一步升值。

title: ‘I worked very hard’: I’m 71 and have $6 million after scrimping and saving. My son, 33, wants money for a house. Do I say yes?
summary: A 71-year-old with $6 million in savings faces a financial decision on whether to help fund a house purchase for their 33-year-old son, who is married with a young child and another on the way. The dilemma highlights tension between securing personal retirement and supporting adult children's major life goals.
content: “My son is 33 years old, married, with an 18-month-old baby and another baby due in September.”

zh.title: "我辛苦工作"：我现年71岁，在多年精打细算后拥有600万美元。我33岁的儿子想要买房的钱。我应该同意吗？
zh.summary: 一位拥有600万美元储蓄的71岁老人面临一个财务困境，不知是否应该帮助33岁儿子购买房屋，他已婚且已有一个小孩，还有另一个即将出生。这个困境凸显了确保个人退休生活稳定与支持成年子女重大人生目标之间的矛盾。

title: An S&P 500 change may be imminent. These stocks are leading contenders to join the index.
summary: With Hologic's acquisition imminent, Marvell, Alnylam, and Veeva emerge as leading candidates to join the S&P 500, according to analyst projections. These eligible replacements could provide significant investment opportunities as the index undergoes restructuring.
content: With Hologic due to get acquired, Marvell, Alnylam and Veeva are among the eligible replacements, according to an analyst.

zh.title: 标普500指数可能即将发生变化。这些股票是加入该指数的主要候选者。
zh.summary: 随着Hologic收购即将完成，Marvell、Alnylam和Veeva成为加入标普500指数的主要候选公司，根据分析师预测。这些合格的替代品可能在该指数重组过程中提供重大投资机会。

title: U.S. oil is breaking out as Iran war continues. A look at how past peaks have affected stocks
summary: U.S. oil prices are surging amid ongoing geopolitical tensions with Iran, prompting analysts to examine how historical oil price peaks have impacted equity markets. The analysis helps investors understand potential stock market implications from current energy price volatility.
content: Katie Stockton of Fairlead Strategies looks at past peaks in oil, and how they've affected equities.

zh.title: 随着伊朗战争持续，美国石油价格突破。历史高点如何影响股市
zh.summary: 美国油价在伊朗地缘政治局势紧张中飙升，促使分析人士研究历史油价高点对股票市场的影响。这项分析帮助投资者理解当前能源价格波动对股市的潜在影响。

title: No longer CEO, Warren Buffett still goes into the office daily—what to do when a former boss now reports to you, work experts say
summary: Warren Buffett continues working in Berkshire Hathaway's office daily despite stepping down as CEO, creating an unusual scenario where the company founder now reports to new leadership. Workplace experts discuss how organizations should navigate transitions when former leaders remain involved.
content: Berkshire Hathaway's Warren Buffett still goes into the office daily, highlighting an unusual dynamic: a leader having a second act within their company.

zh.title: 沃伦·巴菲特不再担任CEO，但仍每天去办公室——当前任老板向你汇报时该如何应对，职场专家说
zh.summary: 沃伦·巴菲特在卸任CEO后仍继续每天在伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司办公，形成了一种不寻常的局面，公司创始人现在向新的领导班子汇报。职场专家讨论了组织在前任领导仍参与其中时如何应对过渡。

title: How a ‘short squeeze’ could still move Avis’s stock much higher
summary: Avis stock could experience significant appreciation due to a technical "short squeeze" triggered in late March, according to Deutsche Bank analysis. The technical pattern could drive further gains for investors positioned to benefit from the squeeze.
content: Avis’s stock could still rally a lot more because of a technical “short squeeze” triggered in late March, according to Deutsche Bank.

zh.title: "空头挤压"如何仍能推动Avis股票大幅上涨
zh.summary: 据德意志银行分析，由于3月末触发的技术性"空头挤压"，Avis股票可能会出现显著升值。这一技术性格局可能为处于有利地位的投资者带来进一步收益。

title: Trump says Iran ceasefire proposal 'significant' but 'not good enough' as Hormuz Strait deadline nears
summary: President Trump describes a proposed 45-day ceasefire with Iran as "significant" but insufficient, as the U.S., Iran, and regional mediators negotiate near the Hormuz Strait deadline. The outcome could substantially impact Middle East stability and global energy markets.
content: The 45-day ceasefire proposal, which could lead to an end to the war, is reportedly being discussed by the U.S., Iran and a group of regional mediators.

zh.title: 特朗普称伊朗停火提案"重要"但"还不够好"，荷尔木兹海峡截止日期临近
zh.summary: 特朗普总统将提议的45天伊朗停火描述为"重要"但不足，美国、伊朗和地区调解人在荷尔木兹海峡截止日期附近进行谈判。这一结果可能会对中东稳定和全球能源市场产生重大影响。

title: These three clothing retailers might be ahead of their rivals in the AI race
summary: Clothing retailers including Abercrombie & Fitch, Gap, and TJX are emerging as frontrunners in artificial intelligence adoption within retail, according to UBS analysis. These chains may possess competitive advantages as the industry increasingly integrates AI technologies.
content: As the retail industry figures out how to put artificial intelligence to use, clothing chains like Abercrombie & Fitch, Gap and TJX could be further along than their rivals in adopting the technology, UBS analysts said Monday.

zh.title: 这三家服装零售商可能在人工智能竞赛中领先对手
zh.summary: 根据瑞银分析，包括Abercrombie & Fitch、Gap和TJX在内的服装零售商正成为零售业人工智能采用的先锋。随着该行业日益融合人工智能技术，这些连锁店可能拥有竞争优势。

title: Average tax refund is up $350 compared to last year as IRS deadline approaches
summary: The average IRS tax refund has increased by $350 compared to the previous year as the filing deadline approaches, reflecting current taxpayer trends. The higher average refund may benefit millions of Americans awaiting their returns.
content: The average IRS tax refund is up $350 compared to last year, based on the latest filing data. Here's what to expect for your return.

zh.title: 随着国税局截止日期临近，平均税收退款比去年增加350美元
zh.summary: 随着报税截止日期临近，平均国税局税收退款与前一年相比增加了350美元，反映了当前纳税人的趋势。较高的平均退款可能会使数百万等待退款的美国人受益。

title: How to trade the key earnings of the week from NYSE insider Jay Woods
summary: CNBC PRO subscribers receive guidance from NYSE insider Jay Woods on key weekly earnings announcements, including reports from Delta Air Lines and Constellation Brands. The analysis identifies trading opportunities around significant corporate earnings releases.
content: In a weekly video to CNBC PRO subscribers, Woods highlighted upcoming earnings from both Delta Air Lines and Constellation Brands.

zh.title: 如何交易纽约证交所内部人士杰伊·伍兹本周关键财报
zh.summary: CNBC PRO订阅者获得纽约证交所内部人士杰伊·伍兹关于关键每周财报公告的指导，包括达美航空和星座品牌的报告。该分析识别了围绕重大企业财报发布的交易机会。

title: FDA declines to issue specific guidance on health programs' foreign drug imports
summary: The FDA has declined to provide specific guidance on health programs' foreign drug imports, despite CNBC's investigation revealing widespread use of approved foreign pharmacy programs that U.S. regulators consider potentially illegal. The lack of regulatory clarity creates uncertainty for programs managing prescription drug costs.
content: A CNBC investigation revealed the proliferation of AFPs, which import prescription drugs from overseas in what U.S. regulators say is a violation of import laws.

zh.title: FDA拒绝就卫生项目外国药物进口提供具体指导
zh.summary: 尽管CNBC的调查揭示了经批准的外国药房计划的广泛使用（美国监管机构认为可能违法），FDA仍拒绝为卫生项目的外国药物进口提供具体指导。监管不确定性的缺乏为管理处方药成本的计划带来了不确定性。

title: Robinhood, BNY to build Trump accounts app
summary: Robinhood and BNY Mellon partner to develop a Trump accounts application, with the Treasury Department designating BNY as the official financial agent managing these accounts. The collaboration represents a significant venture into specialized financial services.
content: The Treasury Department designated BNY as the financial agent to manage Trump accounts. BNY will also partner with Robinhood on a Trump accounts app.

zh.title: Robinhood和BNY Mellon将构建特朗普账户应用
zh.summary: Robinhood和BNY Mellon合作开发特朗普账户应用程序，财政部指定BNY为管理这些账户的官方金融代理。这一合作代表了进入专业金融服务领域的重要举措。

title: Apple’s stock could surge 20%, and the MacBook Neo could be a key catalyst
summary: Analysts project Apple's stock could surge 20% as the company expands into the budget laptop market with the rumored MacBook Neo, potentially driving earnings growth. The new product line represents a significant opportunity to capture price-sensitive consumers.
content: Analysts are bullish on Apple’s expansion into the budget laptop market, which could boost earnings.

zh.title: 苹果股票可能上涨20%，MacBook Neo可能成为关键催化剂
zh.summary: 分析师预测，随着苹果公司进入预算笔记本电脑市场推出传闻中的MacBook Neo，苹果股票可能上涨20%，有望推动收益增长。新产品线代表了一个重要机会来吸引对价格敏感的消费者。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Lucid, AppLovin, Western Digital, Invesco & more
summary: Multiple companies including Lucid, AppLovin, Western Digital, and Invesco are experiencing significant price movements during midday trading. The diverse range of stocks across various sectors indicates broad market activity.
content: Here are some of the companies seeing the biggest moves in midday trading.

zh.title: 股市中午最大波动：Lucid、AppLovin、Western Digital、Invesco等
zh.summary: 包括Lucid、AppLovin、Western Digital和Invesco在内的多家公司在中午交易中经历了显著的价格波动。不同部门股票的多样化范围表明市场活动广泛。

title: Tesla’s stock could fall another 60%, JPMorgan analyst warns. Here’s what’s behind his ‘high degree of caution.’
summary: JPMorgan analyst warns Tesla's stock could decline another 60%, citing deteriorating financial expectations despite the stock's historical appreciation. The warning reflects fundamental concerns about the company's business fundamentals and valuation.
content: JPMorgan warns that financial expectations for Tesla have deteriorated over recent years, even as the stock has climbed.

zh.title: 摩根大通分析师警告特斯拉股票可能再下跌60%。以下是他"高度谨慎"背后的原因
zh.summary: 摩根大通分析师警告特斯拉股票可能再下跌60%，尽管该股票历史上有所升值，但指出财务预期恶化。这一警告反映了对公司业务基本面和估值的根本性担忧。

title: It’s-a-hit: ‘The Super Mario Galaxy Movie’ box office blasts off with $372.5 million globally
summary: Universal Pictures' Super Mario Galaxy sequel opened globally on Wednesday, capitalizing on spring break vacations and the Easter holiday period. The film has reached $372.5 million at the global box office, demonstrating strong demand for Nintendo-branded entertainment.
content: Universal Pictures released the sequel globally on Wednesday, capitalizing on kids' spring break vacations in the week leading up to the Easter holiday.

zh.title: 大热门：《超级马里奥银河电影》全球票房突破3.725亿美元
zh.summary: 环球影业的《超级马里奥银河》续集于周三全球上映，利用春假和复活节假期消费热潮。该电影全球票房已达3.725亿美元，展示了消费者对任天堂品牌娱乐的强劲需求。

title: Tesla is down sharply in 2026. JPMorgan sees the stock falling another 60%
summary: Tesla shares have declined sharply in 2026, and JPMorgan analyst Ryan Brinkman warns investors to approach the stock with caution due to expected further downside. The bank's analysis suggests the stock could fall another 60% from current levels.
content: "We ... advise investors approach TSLA shares with a high degree of caution," analyst Ryan Brinkman said in a note.

zh.title: 特斯拉在2026年大幅下跌。摩根大通预计股价将再下跌60%
zh.summary: 特斯拉股票在2026年大幅下跌，摩根大通分析师瑞恩·布林克曼警告投资者谨慎对待该股票，预期将进一步下跌。该银行分析表明，股价可能从当前水平再下跌60%。

title: United Airlines wants even higher ticket prices. It’ll get them — with or without the Iran war.
summary: United Airlines is pursuing a luxury pricing strategy aimed at raising ticket prices, a risky bet given that fares are already high and customer complaints are mounting. The strategy's success depends on whether consumers accept premium pricing during a period of widespread fare frustration.
content: United’s new ‘luxury’ strategy is a risky bet for investors when fares and complaints are sky-high.

zh.title: 联合航空希望进一步提高票价。无论如何它都会实现——伊朗战争有无都无关
zh.summary: 联合航空正在实施奢侈定价战略以提高票价，这是一场有风险的赌注，因为票价已经很高，客户投诉不断增加。该战略的成功取决于消费者在广泛票价不满的时期是否愿意接受溢价。

title: Is the world running out of oil? Here are three ways Goldman Sachs is answering that critical question.
summary: Goldman Sachs analysts examined global oil supply trends through product supplies, price responses, and market anecdotes to assess whether the world is running short of oil. The analysis helps clarify a critical question for the global economy and energy markets.
content: Analysts led by Yulia Zhestkova Grigsby, a commodities strategist, looked at product supplies, price responses and anecdotes to address the issue of whether the global economy is running short of oil.

zh.title: 世界石油即将枯竭？高盛用三种方法回答这一关键问题
zh.summary: 高盛分析师通过产品供应、价格反应和市场轶事检视全球石油供应趋势,以评估世界是否面临石油短缺。这项分析有助于解答全球经济和能源市场面临的关键问题。

title: Neurocrine expands into metabolic diseases with $2.9 billion Soleno buyout
summary: Neurocrine Biotech is acquiring Soleno Therapeutics for $2.9 billion at $53 per share, a 34% premium to Soleno's previous closing price. The deal allows Neurocrine to expand into metabolic diseases and accelerate its obesity drug development pipeline.
content: Neurocrine has ⁠offered $53 per Soleno share held, which represents a premium of about 34% to the stock's last close.

zh.title: 纽罗泽制药以29亿美元收购Soleno进军代谢疾病领域
zh.summary: 纽罗泽制药公司以每股53美元收购Soleno疗法公司,总价29亿美元,较Soleno前一交易日收盘价溢价34%。此交易使纽罗泽制药得以进军代谢疾病领域,加快其肥胖症药物开发管道。

title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in annual letter cites risks in geopolitics, AI and private markets
summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon's annual shareholder letter highlights significant risks across geopolitics, artificial intelligence, and private markets. Dimon also emphasized America's 250th anniversary and called for recommitment to foundational American ideals.
content: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in his annual letter to shareholders noted the country's 250th anniversary and called for a broad recommitment to American ideals.

zh.title: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙在年度信中指出地缘政治、人工智能和私募股权市场风险
zh.summary: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙的年度股东信强调了地缘政治、人工智能和私募股权市场面临的重大风险。戴蒙还强调了美国成立250周年,并呼吁重新致力于美国的基本理想。

title: Corporate insiders’ stock-market moves don’t match the headlines. Here’s what they’re seeing.
summary: Corporate insiders and directors are increasing their stock stakes despite the recent market selloff, suggesting they view current valuations as attractive. This pattern indicates executives believe the recent decline is temporary and expect recovery.
content: A key indicator shows officers and directors are actually increasing their stakes — betting that the recent selloff is temporary.

zh.title: 企业内部人士的股市举动与头条新闻不符。他们看到了什么？
zh.summary: 尽管最近市场下跌，企业内部人士和董事们仍在增加股份，这表明他们认为当前估值具有吸引力。这种模式表明高管们相信最近的下跌是暂时的，并期待反弹。

title: Google just sucker-punched these highflying tech stocks — don’t let the relief rally fool you
summary: Google's TurboQuant technology has disrupted the memory-chip market's dominance, fundamentally reshaping the investment thesis for AI hardware. The breakthrough undermines the previous assumption that specialized chip makers would dominate AI infrastructure.
content: Google’s TurboQuant cracks the memory-chip cartel — and the hardware-heavy AI thesis now looks like yesterday’s news.

zh.title: 谷歌刚刚给这些飙升的科技股来了一记重拳——别被反弹行情迷惑了
zh.summary: 谷歌的TurboQuant技术扰乱了内存芯片市场的主导地位，从根本上改变了人工智能硬件的投资论点。这一突破削弱了专业芯片制造商将主导人工智能基础设施的先前假设。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Netflix, Soleno Therapeutics, Strategy & more
summary: Multiple stocks are experiencing significant premarket trading moves, including Netflix, Soleno Therapeutics, and Strategy, reflecting overnight developments and earnings announcements. Premarket activity often signals the direction of broader market sentiment for the trading day.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 盘前涨跌幅最大的股票：Netflix、Soleno Therapeutics、Strategy等
zh.summary: 包括Netflix、Soleno Therapeutics和Strategy在内的多只股票正经历显著的盘前交易变动，反映了隔夜发展和财报公告。盘前活动通常预示着交易日更广泛的市场情绪方向。

title: Neurocrine wants to develop new obesity drugs. It’s making an acquisition to accelerate that move.
summary: Neurocrine Biotech is nearing a deal to acquire Soleno Therapeutics as part of its strategy to accelerate obesity drug development. Soleno's stock is surging in premarket trading following reports of the acquisition.
content: Soleno Therapeutics’ stock is soaring on Monday in premarket after a report that Neurocrine is nearing a deal to buy the company.

zh.title: 神经内分泌公司欲开发新型肥胖症药物，正通过并购加速推进
zh.summary: 神经内分泌生物技术公司正在接近与Soleno Therapeutics的交易，以加快肥胖症药物开发。收购消息公布后，Soleno股票在盘前交易中大幅上涨。

title: Netflix is a buy as subscription price hikes drive gains, says Goldman Sachs
summary: Goldman Sachs recommends Netflix as a buy following the company's recent subscription price increases, which are driving revenue gains. The bank believes Netflix shares are poised to move higher on the strength of pricing power.
content: Netflix are poised to go higher after the company recently raised its subscription prices, according to Goldman Sachs.

zh.title: 订阅价格上涨推动收益增长，高盛称Netflix值得买入
zh.summary: 在Netflix近期提高订阅价格后，高盛推荐该公司为买入，这些价格上涨正在推动收益增长。该银行认为Netflix股票有望因定价能力的增强而进一步上涨。

title: Crude oil dropping after historic $11 surge as negotiators race Trump’s deadline for Iran
summary: Crude oil prices fell on Monday after surging $11 historically, as negotiators race to meet President Trump's Tuesday deadline regarding Iran's Strait of Hormuz access. Trump threatened to attack Iran's power plants if it doesn't reopen the critical shipping channel.
content: Oil prices are falling on Monday after President Donald Trump threatened to knock out Iran’s power plants if it doesn’t reopen the Strait of Hormuz by Tuesday.

zh.title: 原油在创纪录的11美元升幅后下跌，谈判者争取赶上特朗普关于伊朗的截止日期
zh.summary: 周一原油价格下跌，此前创造了历史性的11美元涨幅。谈判代表正争取在特朗普关于伊朗霍尔木兹海峡的周二截止日期前达成协议。特朗普威胁，如果伊朗不重新开放这一关键航运通道，他将攻击伊朗的电力设施。

title: Is it unethical to use AI in my Airbnb photos to market my property to guests?
summary: A property owner questions the ethics of using AI-generated images to market their Airbnb rental, after struggling with traditional photography that shows signs of wear. The dilemma reflects broader questions about AI use in consumer marketing.
content: “No matter what I do, the beds still look a bit creased and worn, even grubby, in pictures.”

zh.title: 在Airbnb房源照片中使用AI来营销房产是否不道德？
zh.summary: 一位房产所有者在传统摄影效果不佳后，对使用AI生成的图像来营销Airbnb出租房产的道德性提出质疑。这一困境反映了关于在消费者营销中使用AI的更广泛问题。

title: ‘Our FICO score is excellent’: My husband and I are in our 70s. How do we raise $10,000 for a new roof?
summary: A couple in their 70s with an excellent FICO score seeks advice on raising $10,000 for a roof replacement while managing existing debt including a $30,000 home equity line of credit. Their strong credit profile provides multiple financing options for the repair.
content: “We currently have a home equity line of credit in the amount of $30,000 and a car loan of $15,000.”

zh.title: "我们的FICO分数很高"：我和丈夫都70多岁了，我们如何筹集1万美元来翻修屋顶？
zh.summary: 一对70多岁、FICO分数优异的夫妇寻求建议，希望在管理包括3万美元房屋净值信用额度在内的现有债务的同时，筹集1万美元用于屋顶更换。他们的强大信用档案为维修提供了多种融资选择。

title: India turns to Iran for oil and gas after 7-year hiatus, signaling limits to U.S. tilt
summary: India has resumed oil and gas imports from Iran after a seven-year hiatus, signaling a strategic rebalancing of its relationships and effort to secure supplies through the contested Strait of Hormuz. The move demonstrates limits to India's alignment with U.S. foreign policy.
content: India has resumed oil and gas imports from Iran after seven years, in a bid to rebalance its ties with Tehran and secure supplies through the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 印度在中断7年后转向伊朗购买石油和天然气，暗示对美国立场的限制
zh.summary: 印度在中断7年后恢复从伊朗进口石油和天然气，表明其关系的战略重新平衡和通过争议的霍尔木兹海峡确保供应的努力。这一举措表明了印度与美国外交政策一致性的局限性。

title: 'Positives' for tourism despite Iran war uncertainty
summary: Tourism sector shows positive momentum despite geopolitical risks from Iran conflict. Early-year results were strong, though the situation remains uncertain. New opportunities have also emerged alongside the risks.
content: Bosses say a good start to the year has been put at risk, but opportunities have also emerged.

zh.title: 尽管伊朗战争不确定性 旅游业前景向好
zh.summary: 尽管伊朗冲突带来地缘政治风险，旅游业显示出积极势头。年初成绩不俗，但局势仍存不确定性。风险之外，也出现了新机遇。

title: AI data center boom ‘stress tests’ insurers as private capital floods in
summary: Data center expansion driven by AI investment is presenting both risks and opportunities for insurers. Rapid technological advances and massive capital inflows are testing the insurance industry as private investment accelerates.
content: Rapid technological advancements and the huge sums of money flowing into the data center are posing both risks and rewards for insurers.

zh.title: AI数据中心激增对保险公司"压力测试" 私人资本涌入
zh.summary: AI投资驱动的数据中心扩张为保险公司带来风险和机遇。技术进步迅速，资本大量流入，私人投资加速，考验保险业应变能力。

title: Trump's Iran ultimatum and signals of a possible deal keep investors on tenterhooks
summary: Investors are bracing for a pivotal week in the Iran conflict, positioned for either an imminent ceasefire deal or further escalation. Trump's ultimatum and negotiation signals create binary outcomes with major market implications.
content: Investors head into what could be the most consequential week of the Iran conflict, scrambling to position for binary outcomes: an imminent deal or further escalation.

zh.title: 特朗普伊朗最后通牒及可能和谈信号令投资者坐立不安
zh.summary: 投资者为伊朗冲突关键一周做准备，可能面临即将停火或进一步升级。特朗普的最后通牒和谈判信号造成二元结果，对市场影响重大。

title: Oil prices choppy after expletive-laden Trump threat to Iran
summary: Oil prices surged above $110 per barrel following Trump's threats to Iran but retreated after reports of potential US-Iran ceasefire talks. The market remains volatile amid conflicting signals about escalation versus negotiation.
content: Brent crude rose above $110 before those gains eased after a report of US-Iran talks over a potential ceasefire.

zh.title: 特朗普威胁伊朗后油价波动
zh.summary: 在特朗普威胁伊朗后，油价一度飙升至每桶110美元以上，但随后在美伊停火谈判的报道后回落。市场在升级与谈判的相互矛盾信号中保持波动。

title: Japan, South Korea stocks open higher as investors assess Trump's Iran war comments, extended deadline
summary: Japan and South Korea stock markets opened higher as investors reacted to Trump's inflammatory social media comments regarding Iran, following a U.S. military rescue of an American airman in the region. The market movement reflects investor assessment of geopolitical tensions and policy implications.
content: In an expletive-filled social media post, Trump also vowed to bring "Hell" to the country after the U.S. forces had rescued an American airman shot down in Iran last week.

zh.title: 日本和韩国股市随着投资者评估特朗普对伊朗战争评论而走高，期限延长
zh.summary: 日本和韩国股市走高，因投资者对特朗普关于伊朗的炎症性社交媒体评论做出反应，此前美国军队在该地区救援了一名美国飞行员。市场走势反映了投资者对地缘政治紧张局势和政策影响的评估。

fr.title: Les marchés boursiers du Japon et de la Corée du Sud s'ouvrent plus haut alors que les investisseurs évaluent les commentaires de Trump sur la guerre en Iran, délai prolongé
fr.summary: Les marchés boursiers du Japon et de la Corée du Sud se sont ouverts plus haut alors que les investisseurs réagissaient aux commentaires enflammés de Trump sur les réseaux sociaux concernant l'Iran, suite au sauvetage militaire américain d'un pilote américain dans la région. Le mouvement du marché reflète l'évaluation par les investisseurs des tensions géopolitiques et des implications politiques.

de.title: Japanische und südkoreanische Aktienmärkte öffnen höher, während Investoren Trumps Iran-Kriegskommentare und verlängerte Frist bewerten
de.summary: Die Aktienmärkte in Japan und Südkorea eröffneten höher, da Investoren auf Trumps entzündliche Social-Media-Kommentare zu Iran reagierten, nachdem das US-Militär einen amerikanischen Piloten in der Region gerettet hatte. Die Marktbewegung spiegelt die Einschätzung der Investoren über geopolitische Spannungen und politische Auswirkungen wider.

es.title: Los mercados de valores de Japón y Corea del Sur abren al alza mientras los inversores evalúan los comentarios de Trump sobre la guerra en Irán, plazo extendido
es.summary: Los mercados de valores de Japón y Corea del Sur abrieron al alza mientras los inversores reaccionaban a los comentarios inflamatorios de Trump en redes sociales sobre Irán, luego del rescate militar estadounidense de un piloto estadounidense en la región. El movimiento del mercado refleja la evaluación de los inversores sobre las tensiones geopolíticas e implicaciones políticas.
